papers.title: Differential coupling of gibberellin responses by Rht-B1c suppressor alleles and Rht-B1b in wheat highlights a unique role for the DELLA N-terminus in dormancy
papers.authors: Van De Velde K, Chandler PM, Van Der Straeten D, Rohde A

papers.title: Sequence variations of the partially dominant DELLA gene Rht-B1c in wheat and their functional impacts
papers.authors: Wen W, Deng Q, Jia H, Wei L, Wei J, Wan H, Yang L, Cao W, Ma Z

papers.title: Wheat plant height locus RHT25 encodes a PLATZ transcription factor that interacts with DELLA (RHT1)
papers.authors: Zhang Z, Belcram H, Gornicki P, Charles M, Just J, Huneau C, Magdelenat G, Couloux A, Samain S, Gill BS, Rasmussen JB, Barbe V, Faris JD, Chalhoub B
papers.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences USA

edges.mechanism: DELLA N-terminus uniquely controls seed dormancy; Rht-B1c ovg suppressors enhance dormancy while restoring stature
edges.evidence_sentence: Semi-dwarf ovg alleles increased dormancy, which correlated with improved pre-harvest sprouting resistance

edges.mechanism: DELLA GRAS PFYRE subdomain physically interacts with PLATZ-A1 (RHT25); DELLA-PLATZ1 complex coordinates height
edges.evidence_sentence: PLATZ-A1 showed a positive interaction with RHT1-GRAS in yeast-two-hybrid assays

edges.mechanism: PLATZ transcription factor Rht25; loss-of-function reduces height 12.7%; OE increases height
edges.evidence_sentence: Natural and induced loss-of-function mutations in PLATZ-A1 reduce plant height and its overexpression increases plant height, demonstrating that PLATZ-A1 is the causative gene of RHT25

edges.mechanism: PLATZ1 promotes expression of cell-proliferation TFs GRF1, GRF5, CYCD4;1; loss-of-function downregulates these
edges.evidence_sentence: Loss-of-function caused downregulation of GRF1, GRF5, CYCD4;1 (-17 to -55% reduction)

edges.mechanism: GRF4 competes with PLATZ1 for DELLA binding; three-way interactions reduce PLATZ1-DELLA binding 74%
edges.evidence_sentence: expression of GRF4 as the third protein reduced the interaction between PLATZ1 and DELLA by 74%

edges.mechanism: DELLA sequesters PIF transcription factors to suppress cell elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: The accumulated mutant protein constitutively blocks phytochrome-interacting factor activity, suppressing cell elongation genes

edges.mechanism: Accumulated Rht-B1c maintains GATA22 expression higher than WT; GATA22 upregulates chlorophyll/photosynthesis genes
edges.evidence_sentence: Rht-B1c line consistently maintained a markedly higher expression level of GATA22 compared to Rht-B1a lines

edges.mechanism: GATA22 upregulates HEMA1, GUN4, CAO1, PorB and photosynthetic genes rbcS, CAB
edges.evidence_sentence: Elevated GATA22 upregulates HEMA1, GUN4, CAO1, PorB, and photosynthetic genes (rbcS, CAB)

perturbations.evidence_sentence: Rht-B1c.22 (tall): stem length 15-22% longer than Rht-B1b
perturbations.notes: Suppressor ovg allele in Rht-B1c background; restores tall; reference is Rht-B1b dwarf

perturbations.evidence_sentence: combined platz1 mutant showed a significant reduction in plant height (12.7%), peduncle length (18.7%)
UBI::PLATZ1 overexpression: Taller plants; longer peduncles; male sterile
